category_sources: source_facts.description says f2 is a command-line batch renaming tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official ayoisaiah/f2 repository, whose project title is F2.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ayoisaiah/f2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies batch renaming and command-line usage.
source_facts.executables lists f2 as the executable.
